summary: There was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for omeprazole on 2022-03-02, with 90 reports received, exceeding the expected count of 57.41.
notable_pattern: Reports from this time window often involved multiple medications and severe adverse events, including hospitalizations and life-threatening conditions.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any clinical conclusions can be drawn.
